ai_summary: Mahindra Lifespace Developers, through its material subsidiaries, has signed a Second Supplemental Agreement with Sumitomo Corporation to expand their Chennai industrial park by developing Phase 2B. This signifies a positive continuation and strategic growth in their industrial parks segment, extending a long-standing joint venture. While a related party transaction, it is explicitly stated to be conducted at arm's length, mitigating potential concerns and presenting no immediate red flags.
